accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context about the 1996 Act and DoD authority.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; DoD and statute references are correct.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes and modifies DoD authority to sell aircraft/parts for wildfire suppression.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies amendments to the Wildfire Suppression Aircraft Transfer Act of 1996.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the use restriction limiting sold aircraft/parts to wildfire suppression aircraft services.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the authority period from June 12, 2025 to October 1, 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures reauthorization period, addition of water, use restriction, and cross-reference update.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, descriptive tone with no editorializing.

correct_entities.why: Department of Defense and the 1996 Act are correctly named.

correct_figures.why: Dates June 12, 2025 and October 1, 2035 match the bill text.
